items.title: Divide Among Supreme Court’s Conservatives Could Test Trump’s Agenda

items.title: Blizzard Warnings Issued for Swath of East Coast, Including N.Y.C.
items.description: The blizzard warnings are the first since 2017 for New York City, which is expected to get up to 18 inches of snow, or more.
